name: tophant-clawvault
description: AI security system that protects agents from prompt injection, data leakage, and dangerous commands. Operates as local HTTP proxy to inspect traffic. Review SECURITY.md before installing.
author: Tophant SPAI Lab

permissions_rationale.execute_command: Required to run pip install and start/stop ClawVault services
permissions_rationale.network: Downloads ClawVault package and proxies AI traffic for inspection

generate-rule.description: Generate security rule from natural language or scenario

status.description: Get ClawVault running status and statistics
